title: Work permit for overnight camp counsellors - Canada.ca
content:
## Work permit for overnight camp counsellors
Overnight camp counsellors, including those working at faith-based camps, can apply for an employer-specific work permit .
Your employer doesn’t need a labour market impact assessment (LMIA) if you’re an overnight camp counsellor working during the summer season.

## LMIA-required overnight camp counsellors
Overnight camp counsellors working outside the summer months need an LMIA .
